tagline: Water-wise, design-built gardens from a Sonoma Valley family with decades in the trade.
seoDescription: Ray LaVoy's Landscaping is a family design-build landscaper in Sonoma — pond-less waterfalls, paver patios, rock walls, planting, and water-conscious irrigation, with decades of work across Sonoma Valley, Boyes Hot Springs, and Glen Ellen.
heroHeading: Design-built, water-wise gardens for Sonoma Valley
heroSubheading: Ray LaVoy and his family build water-conscious landscapes and artisan gardens across Sonoma, Boyes Hot Springs, and Glen Ellen — pond-less waterfalls, paver patios, rock walls, and planting, with decades of local craft behind every project.
highlights: Decades of design-build landscaping across Sonoma Valley
Family-run — Ray, his dad, and their team
Sonoma, Boyes Hot Springs & Glen Ellen
aboutBody: Ray LaVoy's Landscaping is a family design-build operation based in Sonoma, where founder Ray LaVoy brings knowledge, integrity, and craftsmanship to water-conscious landscapes and artisan gardens. Ray, his dad, and their team have worked the Sonoma Valley, Boyes Hot Springs, and Glen Ellen areas for decades.

The work is hands-on and design-led: pond-less waterfalls and water features, paver patios, rock and retaining walls, planting, and efficient irrigation, plus practical services like defensible-space management and material delivery. It's the kind of careful, water-wise landscaping that fits Sonoma's climate and lasts.

services.title: Landscape Design & Build
services.description: Full design-and-build landscaping, from concept to a finished, planted garden.

services.title: Pond-less Waterfalls & Water Features
services.description: A specialty — pond-less waterfalls and water features that bring sound and movement without the upkeep.

services.title: Paver Patios
services.description: Paver patios and pathways that shape how you live in and move through the garden.

services.title: Rock & Retaining Walls
services.description: Stone and retaining walls that hold a slope and define a space, built to last.

services.title: Planting & Water-Wise Irrigation
services.description: Climate-appropriate planting paired with efficient, water-conscious irrigation.

services.title: Defensible Space & Delivery
services.description: Defensible-space management plus plant, tree, soil, and mulch delivery and yard-debris hauling.

testimonials.quote: They do excellent work — they've been in business in the Sonoma, Boyes Hot Springs, and Glen Ellen areas for decades, with water-feature expertise as a specialty.
testimonials.author: Verified Nextdoor recommendation · Sonoma

notes: VERIFIED 2026-06-29 from landscape-sonoma.com (thin, amateur, dated early-2010s site — weak-site bar PASSED) and Nextdoor (Local Landscapers, 7 recommendations). Owner: Ray LaVoy (founder, 'Local Landscapers' / Landscape Sonoma); works with his dad and team. Phone (707) 287-6800. Owner-direct email ray@landscape-sonoma.com. Address 943 Donald St, Sonoma CA 95476 (per Nextdoor). Services verified from Nextdoor + his site (design/build, pond-less waterfalls, paver patios, rock walls, planting, irrigation, defensible space, delivery/hauling). Testimonial lightly de-abbreviated from a real Nextdoor recommendation ('they do excellent work... in business in the Sonoma/BHS/Glen Ellen areas for decades with water feature expertise specialty'). Founding year not verified — established omitted.
